# Zenara Designs

> Web design and development agency serving Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). We build modern, fast, secure, conversion-focused websites for small businesses and professionals — law firms, accounting firms, clinics, renovation companies, and more.

## About

- Name: Zenara Designs
- Type: Web design & development agency (service-area business, no physical storefront)
- Service area: Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, Oakville, Burlington, Hamilton, Scarborough, North York, Etobicoke, Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, Newmarket, Aurora, Stouffville
- Email: info@zenaradesigns.com
- Phone: (647) 835-1077
- Website: https://zenaradesigns.com

## Services

- Custom web design & development (Next.js, modern responsive sites): https://zenaradesigns.com/services/web-design
- E-commerce development: https://zenaradesigns.com/services/ecommerce
- Logo design & brand identity: https://zenaradesigns.com/services/logo-design
- Business card design: https://zenaradesigns.com/services/business-cards
- SEO services: https://zenaradesigns.com/services/seo
- Hosting & maintenance: https://zenaradesigns.com/services/hosting

## Pricing

- Starter: $999 (1–3 pages, ~1 week)
- Small Business: $1,999 (up to 6 pages, 2–3 weeks)
- Pro: $4,999+ (advanced functionality, unlimited pages, 3–4 weeks)
- All plans include mobile-responsive design, SEO optimization, and SSL security.
- Details: https://zenaradesigns.com/pricing

## Industry expertise

- Law firms: https://zenaradesigns.com/lawyers
- Accounting firms: https://zenaradesigns.com/accountants
- Renovation companies: https://zenaradesigns.com/renovations
- Wellness clinics: https://zenaradesigns.com/clinics
